package.title: TRAGUIN Premium Chhattisgarh Tour Package — Educational Bastar Experience • Anthropology, Art & Geography

highlights.text: Serial code CG-007 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-CG-EDU-007
State / Country: Chhattisgarh / India | Category: School / Educational Group Tour
Ideal for: Students, Educators & Academic Groups
Best season: October to March (Excellent for field studies)
Starting price: On Request (Premium Group Tier)
Vehicle: Private AC Luxury Coaches (GPS & Attendant) | Meal Plan: Premium Buffet Plan
Route Plan: Raipur Arrival ➔ Kondagaon ➔ Jagdalpur / Bastar (2N) ➔ Chitrakote (1N) ➔ Raipur Departure
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Hands-on wax-moulding workshop with National Award-winning Dhonkra artisans.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Field study workbooks and campfire tribal folk dance presentation.
Premium Handpicked Hotels: Student floor partitions with rigorous security and hygiene standards.
Shopping: Dhonkra miniatures, terracotta crafts, forest honey, Tussar weaving centers.
Important Notes: Share student rosters 30 days prior; book Chitrakote rooms 60–90 days ahead.

itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Chhattisgarh Tour Package — Educational Bastar Experience • Anthropology, Art & Geography
itinerary.tagline: Educational Bastar • Raipur • Kondagaon • Jagdalpur • Chitrakote • 04 Nights / 05 Days
itinerary.overview:
Welcome to a living classroom like no other. The definitive Best Chhattisgarh Tour Package, engineered by TRAGUIN, invites young minds to discover ancient history, indigenous arts, and magnificent geographical wonders optimized for learning outcomes and team safety.

TOUR OVERVIEW
The Educational Bastar field expedition covers historical, anthropological, and geographical landmarks of southern Chhattisgarh over 5 days. Private luxury coach transportation with strict safety protocols, expert destination handlers, and wholesome dietary meal planning throughout.

WHY CHOOSE THE PREMIUM EDUCATIONAL BASTAR FIELD STUDY?
Iconic Attractions: Chitrakote Waterfalls, Anthropological Museum, Kanger Valley ecosystems. Student Safety Highlights: Verified premium hotels with separate student wings, multi-vehicle tracking, onboard first-aid support. Best Time: October to March for field walks and group data logging.
itinerary.seo_title: CG-007 | Educational Bastar Raipur Kondagaon Chitrakote | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days educational Bastar tour (CG-007 / TG-CG-EDU-007): Dhonkra workshop, anthropological fieldwork, Chitrakote hydro-geography, and 4-tier group hotels.

highlights.text: Raipur arrival, Purkhouti Muktangan museum orientation on Day 01
Kondagaon Dhonkra bell-metal hands-on workshop on Day 02
Anthropological Museum and Bastar Palace fieldwork on Day 03
Chitrakote hydro-geography boat study and tribal folk dance on Day 04
Chitrakote to Raipur group departure on Day 05

days.title: RAIPUR ARRIVAL — ORIENTATION & MODERN CHHATTISGARH STUDY
days.description: Student group arrives at Raipur and is received by TRAGUIN tour coordinators. Transfer to premium group hotel for safety briefing and orientation on Bastar tribal anthropology. Afternoon panoramic drive across Naya Raipur and visit Purkhouti Muktangan open-air museum displaying tribal architecture models.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Naya Raipur architectural drive, Purkhouti Muktangan Museum.
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Group Hotel, Raipur.
Meals Included: Welcome Group Drinks, Buffet Lunch & Wholesome Dinner.

days.title: RAIPUR TO JAGDALPUR — THE DHONKRA BELL-METAL CRAFT KILNS OF KONDAGAON
days.description: Board luxury coaches heading south through Keshkal Ghat hills. Arrive at Kondagaon for a TRAGUIN Signature interactive workshop where National Award-winning artisans demonstrate lost-wax Dhonkra Bell-Metal technique. Students get hands-on experience shaping clay core designs before arriving in Jagdalpur.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Keshkal Ghat geographical pass, Kondagaon Dhonkra workshops.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Hotel, Jagdalpur.
Meals Included: Full Buffet Breakfast, Hot Highway Lunch & Wholesome Dinner.

days.title: JAGDALPUR — ANTHROPOLOGICAL FIELDWORK & TRIBAL DYNASTIC RECORDS
days.description: Begin at the Anthropological Museum with custom field study worksheets documenting Maria, Muria, and Bhatra cultures. Visit Bastar Palace analyzing regional and colonial architectural elements. Participate in an immersive experience with local youth leaders on forest resource conservation methods.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Bastar Anthropological Museum, Bastar Royal Palace historical tour.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Premium Hotel, Jagdalpur.
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast, Group Lunch & Multi-cuisine Dinner.

days.title: JAGDALPUR TO CHITRAKOTE — HYDRO-GEOGRAPHY OF THE NIAGARA OF INDIA
days.description: Drive to Chitrakote Waterfalls spanning nearly 300 meters during peak flow. Geography handlers guide students along safe terraced paths analyzing erosion patterns. Enjoy a safe private boat excursion across the calm lower pool. Evening campfire with traditional tribal folk dances by native youth groups.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Chitrakote Horseshoe Falls canyon, Indravati River basin paths.
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Riverside Eco-Resort, Chitrakote.
Meals Included: Buffet Breakfast, Resort Lunch & Festive Farewell Dinner.

days.title: CHITRAKOTE TO RAIPUR — DATA LOGGING & FINAL DEPARTURE
days.description: Catch morning rainbow over Chitrakote Falls mist. Return journey north to Raipur with farewell group lunch along the highway. Arrive at Raipur Airport or Railway Station for institutional departures.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Return scenic highway transit, private group transfer.
Meals Included: Full Buffet Breakfast & Farewell Group Highway Lunch.

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 04 Nights with dedicated student floor partitions.
Wholesome Catering: All buffet breakfasts, lunches, and nutritious dinners.
Luxury Group Transit: Private AC coaches with GPS tracking and school-vetted drivers.
Academic Handlers: Local historians, tribal guides, and interactive worksheets.
TRAGUIN Signatures: Dhonkra moulding masterclass and campfire tribal dance.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 support with onboard safety manager.
Train or flight tickets from institutional hubs to Raipur.
Personal items, optional activities, and travel insurance.
